_comment: Generated and maintained by DASH. This egg is a thin SSH client; it does not contain Funcom software or receive the Docker socket.
name: DASH Remote Controller
author: DASH maintainers
description: Constrained Pelican/Pterodactyl console for a separately provisioned DASH host. Requires a forced-command SSH key and pinned DASH source release.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -q
apt-get install -y -q --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl openssh-client python3 tar
[[ "${DASH_RELEASE_REF:-}" =~ ^[0-9a-f]{40}$ ]] || { echo 'DASH_RELEASE_REF must be a full lowercase commit' >&2; exit 2; }
[[ "${DASH_RELEASE_SHA256:-}" =~ ^[0-9a-f]{64}$ ]] || { echo 'DASH_RELEASE_SHA256 must be a full SHA-256' >&2; exit 2; }
archive=/tmp/dash-source.tar.gz
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -fL "https://github.com/snapetech/DuneAwakeningSelfHost/archive/${DASH_RELEASE_REF}.tar.gz" -o "$archive"
echo "${DASH_RELEASE_SHA256}  $archive" | sha256sum -c -
mkdir -p /mnt/server/secrets /tmp/dash-extract
chmod 0700 /mnt/server/secrets
tar -xzf "$archive" -C /tmp/dash-extract --no-same-owner --no-same-permissions
client="$(find /tmp/dash-extract -type f -path '*/packaging/pelican/panel-client.py' -print -quit)"
[[ -n "$client" ]] || { echo 'panel client missing from release' >&2; exit 1; }
install -m 0755 "$client" /mnt/server/dash-panel-client.py
printf '%s\n' 'Upload secrets/id_ed25519 (mode 0600) and secrets/known_hosts before starting.' > /mnt/server/SETUP.txt

variables.name: DASH release commit
variables.description: Full immutable 40-hex commit containing the controller.

variables.name: DASH archive SHA-256
variables.description: Exact SHA-256 for the GitHub source archive.

variables.name: Remote DASH host
variables.description: DNS name or address pinned in known_hosts.

variables.name: Remote SSH port
variables.description: SSH listener on the DASH host.

variables.name: SSH key path
variables.description: Private key uploaded after install; never put key material in a variable.

variables.name: Known hosts path
variables.description: Pinned host key file uploaded after install.
